description: The trees here are made of twisted leather and giant shoelaces. The ground is a soft moss of lint. A dark path leads deeper into the forest to the south, while another trail heads east.

wall.description: Dense shoelace trees. Their roots are tangled knots.

lint_moss.description: A soft, springy layer of lint moss.

exit_north_street.description: The main road leads back to Shoeboxlandia Street.

exit_south.description: The path leads deeper into the dark Shoelace Forest.

exit_east.description: The path leads east toward the Whispering Cave.

npc_snake.description: A shoelace snake is coiled around a leather tree, hissing softly.

dialogue.text: "Sssss... a new shoe in the foresssst... how tsssss-ty..."
Fred screams at the snake. The snake recoils in shock. "Ssss-top that! My ear-holesssss!"
"Fine, fine... passsss through, loud shoe. But watch your sssss-tep in the deep foresssst. Thingsssss are much more hungry there."
